nasb.text: After these events King Ahasuerus promoted Haman, the son of Hammedatha the Agagite, and advanced him and established his authority over all the princes who were with him.

esv.text: After these things King Ahasuerus promoted Haman the Agagite, the son of Hammedatha, and advanced him and set his throne above all the officials who were with him.

cnv.text: 這事以後，亞哈隨魯王使亞甲族哈米大他的兒子哈曼晉陞；王提拔他，使他的地位高過所有與他在一起的大臣。

ccb.text: 后来，亚哈随鲁王擢升亚甲人哈米大他的儿子哈曼，使他的权位高过他所有的同僚。
